reason_for_decision: The revised article clears the pass threshold with stronger fusion logic, clearer complexity trade-offs, and more useful criteria for when layering is justified.
strengths: The article now explains what fusion actually has to do instead of using the term as a generic positive label.
It gives a clearer threshold for when extra sensors create real value and when they only add burden.
The single-sensor discussion remains balanced rather than treating simplicity as inferiority.
summary_assessment: This version passes because it ties sensor layering to operator decision quality instead of to architecture fashion. It now reads like a serious planning comparison.
